title: callitris commersonii
intro: Callitris commersonii, also known as the Buloke or Buloke Pine, is a species of coniferous tree native to Australia. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine, with its extracts exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Callitris commersonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Callitris commersonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
